mapper.select: SELECT env_id AS envId, item_name AS itemName, value, unit, measured_date AS measuredDate, latitude, longitude, SQRT( POW((latitude - #{lat}) * 111320, 2) + POW((longitude - #{lng}) * 111320 * COS(RADIANS(#{lat})), 2) ) AS distance FROM environment_info HAVING distance <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance ASC, env_id ASC
